article_meta.title: Kid Rock Buries Bad Bunny in TMZ's Post-Super Bowl Halftime Show Poll 31 Chris Graythen/Getty ImagesWarner Todd Huston11

reasoning: The summary avoids Breitbart’s charged framing (e.g., “buries,” “rabidly anti-Trump,” “fans did not fall for the push”) and uses distancing language (“the article suggests,” “allegedly”). It remains largely neutral in word choice. Minor issue: one contested claim (“nearly half… tuned out”) is presented with vague attribution. Also, sources_represented omits TMZ despite being a distinct perspective/source in the article.

custom_reasoning.spin: Replaces loaded verbs with neutral phrasing; avoids “buries,” says “outperformed.”
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: “Nearly half tuned out” is included with vague attribution (“reports indicate”) and no source detail.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Subjective claims are attributed (“the article suggests,” “allegedly”).
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No heightened or dramatic language beyond article’s tone.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s own voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about intentions or thoughts.
custom_reasoning.slant: Tracks the source’s emphasis but with attribution; no over-weighting beyond source.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Captures all main claims from the article; minor omissions only.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Adjectives are restrained; “significantly” is mild and supported by numbers.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Politically neutral terminology; avoids Breitbart’s charged labels.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Includes negative items about Bad Bunny as in the source; not amplified.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No systematic favoring of elites vs. grassroots sources.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Consistently distances and neutralizes the source’s loaded framing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Lists only Breitbart; omits TMZ as a distinct perspective/source referenced in the article.
